## Meeting Purpose

[Preview AI workflows workshop led by GrowthX to introduce AI-assisted productivity techniques.](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Becoming "AI native" requires dedicated time to experiment and learn how to effectively delegate tasks to AI](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [AI workflows can dramatically accelerate work by automating repetitive tasks while still leveraging human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Start small by decomposing jobs into steps, identifying where AI can assist, and iterating to improve workflows](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [The workshop will provide hands-on training to build custom AI workflows without requiring coding skills](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's AI Journey

  - [Started exploring AI tools like AirHog to build workflows and save time](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Created an AI-generated apps directory that drove significant traffic for his company](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Began offering workshops to teach others how to build AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Founded GrowthX to help companies implement AI-assisted productivity techniques](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### AI Workflow Examples

  - [Content generation: Analyzing competitors, generating outlines, writing articles](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Sales outreach: Scraping prospect data, analyzing psychographics, drafting personalized emails](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Customer success: Analyzing call transcripts, scoring account health, enriching CRM data](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Marketing: Scoring keyword relevance, analyzing user intent](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)

### Approach to Building AI Workflows

  - [Decompose jobs into steps (inputs, processors, variables, planners, doers, critics, adapters)](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Provide context and clear instructions to the AI](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Identify where human judgment/expertise is critical](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Start small and iterate to improve results](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Focus on applying AI to energizing high-impact tasks](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)

### Workshop Preview

  - [Will cover how to build workflows for various business functions](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Hands-on training, no coding skills required](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [6 sessions planned over next few months](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=2317.0)
  - [First session on October 7th (in-person in NYC) and October 11th (virtual)](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=2319.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sign up for workshop if interested in hands-on training](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=2185.0)
  - [Consider areas in your work that could benefit from AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=2884.0)
  - [Experiment with decomposing tasks and identifying AI opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=2884.0)
  - [Block dedicated time to learn and become more "AI native"](https://fathom.video/share/6DsJ7Bzjw885DyQLdxyrnpoCkBV5WskN?tab=summary&timestamp=2607.0)
